query: AORUS MASTER 16 BZH 和 BYH 的顯示晶片有什麼不同？

query: Compare the graphics power of the BYH and BXH models.
expected_answer: The AORUS MASTER 16 BYH's NVIDIA® GeForce RTX™ 5080 Laptop GPU has a 175W Maximum Graphics Power with Dynamic Boost*, while the BXH's NVIDIA® GeForce RTX™ 5070 Ti Laptop GPU has a 140W Maximum Graphics Power with Dynamic Boost*. Note that actual performance may vary by scenario.
actual_answer: The AORUS MASTER 16 BYH features a higher maximum graphics power of 175W (RTX 5080) compared to the BXH's 140W (RTX 5070 Ti). While the BYH has a slightly lower VRAM (16GB vs 12GB), it delivers more robust graphics performance due to its higher power and GPU specification. The BYH also has a higher AI Boost clock at 1902 MHz compared to the BXH's 1962 MHz, though this is a minor difference in boost performance. Both models use GDDR7 memory and Dynamic Boost technology. The BYH offers significantly greater graphics power and overall performance for demanding workloads.
